name: @metorial/netlify
description: Manage web application sites, deploys, builds, build hooks, deployed files, metadata, and hosting on Netlify. Create, update, configure, list, and delete sites. Manage environment variables with per-context values and scopes. Access and manage form submissions, including spam filtering. Configure DNS zones and records. Inject JavaScript or HTML snippets into site pages. Create and manage split tests (A/B testing) for traffic routing between branches. Set up notification hooks for deploy and form submission events. Purge CDN cached content by site or cache tag.
skills: inspect deployed files and site metadata
